briefs.title: BC Railway Safety Rules Updated: New Extreme Heat Rules and Revised Operating Standards Effective January 2026
briefs.summary: BC's Railway Safety Adopted Provisions Regulation is amended effective January 15, 2026, updating three existing rules and adding the Railway Extreme Heat and Fire Risk Mitigation Rules (June 15, 2022).
briefs.action_required: Ensure railway operations comply with all four updated/added rules by January 15, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Railway Safety Adopted Provisions Regulation amendments take effect
